name: ai-writing-signals-review
description: A portable, model-agnostic editorial quality skill with two modes: Safe Review Mode (assess text for AI-like signals as indicators for human review, never proof of authorship) and Prose Cleanup Mode (tighten your own draft for clarity, specificity, and rhythm).

safe_review.purpose: Assess text you may not edit; produce a three-bucket report with false-positive warnings.

prose_cleanup.purpose: Tighten your own draft before publishing; improve clarity, specificity, and rhythm.

additional_sources.title: Stop Slop
additional_sources.author: Hardik Pandya
additional_sources.used_for: Prose Cleanup Mode ideas, reworded and reframed with safer, non-absolutist framing.
